nodes.name: Ixothraupis
nodes.summary: Ixothraupis（Ixothraupis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联5种鸟类，如Dotted tanager、Rufous-throated tanager、Speckled tanager等5种鸟类。

nodes.name: Rufous-throated tanager
nodes.summary: The rufous-throated tanager (Ixothraupis rufigula) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Colombia and Ecuador. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist montane forests and heavily degraded former forest. References
nodes.shortSummary: The rufous-throated tanager (Ixothraupis rufigula) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Colombia and Ecuador.

nodes.name: Rufous-throated tanager
